BUIDL_OPC_Hackathon_SG · Claude + AWS
FarmOS

The farm that runs itself.

An autonomous operating system for a one-person, off-grid, self-sustaining eco-tourism farm — run by an AI agent that keeps it alive through any blackout.

Team FarmOS Labs · live at farmos-ochre.vercel.app · press → to begin
01 · The problem

A diversified farm is ten
businesses in one.

✕

Running it takes a whole operations team — livestock, crops, lodging, processing, energy.

✕

Farm software is fragmented — no single history of every field, batch and animal.

✕

Data lands hours late, so the moment to intervene is already gone.

✕

And when the grid or internet drops, an off-grid farm simply stops.

02 · The gap

Nobody gives a diversified
farm one brain.

Enterprise agAll-in-one appsIoT stacksFarmOS
Real-time digital twin~✕✓✓
Autonomous agent (acts)✕✕✕✓
Off-grid energy aware✕✕~✓
Offline-resilient✕✕~✓
Diversified (18 verticals)✕~✕✓
Live P&L per vertical~✓✕✓

Enterprise tools do crops. All-in-one apps do record-keeping. IoT platforms do control. Only FarmOS is real-time and autonomous and unified and offline-proof.

03 · The solution

One AI runs the whole farm.

Sense

One live twin — every animal, crop, tank & watt. 18 verticals, one source of truth.

Predict

Forward-simulates the day and acts before a crisis, not after.

Act

Claude decides & operates through 12+ tools — every action logged with its reason.

Sustain

Protects life-support as a hard rule; keeps running when the grid goes dark.

Livestock, crops, aquaculture, processing, energy & hospitality — one live twin, one autonomous agent across all of it.

05 · Live demo
▶ Watch it run itself.
🛰 Autopilot ON→ ⚡ Crisis: battery 22%→ do nothing→ sheds pumps & lights· protects the animals→ 🌩 Outage→ keeps running offline

No scripts. The AI decides in real time and explains every move — then I cut the internet, and it keeps the farm alive.

▶ Try it live — farmos-ochre.vercel.app
06 · How it works

Claude is the brain.
AWS is the body.

Sensors→ MQTT→ AWS IoT Core→ Lambda · tools→ Bedrock · Claude→ Actions

An on-site Raspberry Pi runs the local-first stack, so the farm survives cloud & internet outages. Claude is real tool-use, not a chatbot. Flip simulated:false and the same code drives real hardware — every device already carries its address.

07 · Impact & business

Profitable, self-sufficient,
and it wastes nothing.

Live P&L
real profit & loss across every vertical
08 · The experience

A working farm you can
honeymoon on.

The farm is the attraction. Guests stay, celebrate and play — every vertical doubles as an experience and a second revenue stream, and the agent runs it all in the background.

Weddings & events Glamping & eco-cabins Pool · lazy river · waterpark Horse riding Fishing & prawning ATV & archery Kayaking Forest adventure Farm-to-table dining Kids farm camp
09 · What's next

From demo to a living farm.

Real hardware binding CV livestock & crop health Eco-tourism guest app Carbon credits · ESG Multi-farm replication
The code path to real hardware already exists. We're looking for a pilot site, partners, and investment.
One person. One AI. A whole farm — alive through any blackout.
